code.description: The production code surface of the Go noise-chatbot implementation, spanning 6 packages, plus concurrency and pipeline structure.

properties.name: noise_chatbot.super.trug.json
properties.description: Standalone black-box specification of the Go noise-chatbot implementation — super-TRUG for Python rewrite. Encrypted chatbot framework using Noise_IK (Curve25519 + ChaCha20-Poly1305 + BLAKE2b).

properties.role: Noise_IK TCP transport (handshake + length-prefixed framed encryption).
Chatbot server — template-mode LLM classification + honeypot + wind-down.
stdin/stdout Noise_IK bridge binary (noise-helper) for non-Go clients.
Four example binaries: echo, faq, llm, graph.

properties.name: DHKey
properties.trl: DEFINE RECORD DHKey CONTAINS STRING public AND STRING private.
properties.notes: Re-export of flynn/noise static keypair type.

properties.name: NoiseConn
properties.concurrency_impl: sync.Mutex mu (writes) + sync.Mutex rmu (reads) — two separate mutexes permit concurrent read+write
properties.trl: DEFINE RECORD NoiseConn CONTAINS RESOURCE conn AND DATA encrypt AND DATA decrypt AND STRING remote.
properties.vocab_gap: sync.Mutex fields mu/rmu — no TRL word for lock primitive; encoded as properties only.

properties.name: Listener
properties.trl: DEFINE RECORD Listener CONTAINS RESOURCE inner AND RECORD serverKey.

properties.name: CipherSuite
properties.trl: DEFINE RESOURCE CipherSuite AS IMMUTABLE DATA.

properties.name: Message
properties.trl: DEFINE RECORD Message CONTAINS STRING type AND DATA payload AND STRING id AND OPTIONAL STRING reply_to.

properties.name: ResponseNode
properties.trl: DEFINE RECORD ResponseNode CONTAINS STRING id AND ARRAY keywords AND STRING response.

properties.name: Classifier
properties.trl: DEFINE FUNCTION Classifier SHALL MAP STRING userText AND ARRAY nodes AS ARRAY ids.

properties.name: ChatHandler
properties.trl: DEFINE FUNCTION ChatHandler SHALL MAP STRING text AS STRING response.

properties.name: MessageHandler
properties.trl: DEFINE FUNCTION MessageHandler SHALL MAP RECORD Message AS RECORD Message.

properties.name: SafetyConfig
properties.trl: DEFINE RECORD SafetyConfig CONTAINS INTEGER MaxInputTokens AND INTEGER MaxInputBytes AND INTEGER RateLimit AND INTEGER SessionTimeout AND STRING Greeting AND INTEGER ConfidenceMin.

properties.name: ConnectionStats
properties.trl: DEFINE RECORD ConnectionStats CONTAINS INTEGER MessagesReceived AND OBJECT NodeHits AND INTEGER NoMatchCount AND DATA ConnectedAt AND DATA LastMessageAt.

properties.name: LLMConfig
properties.trl: DEFINE RECORD LLMConfig CONTAINS STRING Provider AND STRING Model AND STRING APIKeyEnv.

properties.name: Server
properties.role: long-running chatbot server with template-mode classification
properties.default_no_match_text: I don't have information about that. Please contact us directly.
properties.trl: DEFINE SERVICE Server CONTAINS RECORD key AND FUNCTION chatHandler AND FUNCTION msgHandler AND ARRAY responses AND ARRAY guardrails AND FUNCTION classifier AND FUNCTION fallbackClassifier AND RECORD safety AND OBJECT bannedKeys AND FUNCTION onAnalytics.
vocab_gaps: Builder pattern (*Server→*Server chain) — encode as builder_chain: true on each With*/On* FUNCTION.
sync.RWMutex bannedMu / sync.Mutex rateMu — encoded as properties only.

properties.name: DefaultGuardrails
properties.trl: DEFINE RESOURCE DefaultGuardrails AS ARRAY OF RECORD ResponseNode CONTAINS 15 RECORD.
properties.duplicate_source_note: 15 entries are also in guardrails.trug.json (disk copy, additively loaded via WithGuardrails).

properties.name: signal_handler
properties.action_on_signal: cancel root context and close listener
properties.vocab_gap: goroutine / OS-signal plumbing not in TRL — encoded as properties.

properties.name: accept_loop
properties.role: main accept loop in ListenAndServe / ServeListener; spawns per-connection workers
properties.vocab_gap: 'one goroutine per accepted connection' — PARALLEL adverb is coarse; no TRL for per-event spawn.

properties.name: serveConn_worker
properties.lifecycle: until recv error, ctx cancel, session timeout, or honeypot/wind-down ban

properties.name: ctx
properties.role: root cancellation tree; feeds signal_handler and serveConn_worker
properties.vocab_gap: context.Context hierarchical cancellation — no TRL primitive.

properties.name: Client
properties.trl: DEFINE RECORD Client CONTAINS RECORD conn.

properties.name: noise-helper
properties.trl: DEFINE INTERFACE noise-helper CONTAINS ENTRY stdin AND EXIT stdout AND EXIT stderr.

properties.name: main
properties.role: parse flags → handshake → spawn reader goroutine → stdin scan loop

properties.name: reader-goroutine-closure
properties.role: receive from server, write to stdout, os.Exit(0) on recv error (EOF = clean)

properties.name: helper_main
properties.role: main stdin→server loop (bufio.Scanner with 16 MiB buffer)

properties.name: faq
properties.role: FAQ bot — loads faq.json, case-insensitive keyword match
properties.handler: substring Q→A lookup; fallback lists available keys

properties.name: llm
properties.handler: "LLM integration coming soon. You asked: " + text

properties.name: graph
properties.handler: "Graph-backed response coming soon. You asked: " + text

properties.role: entry-point for every Message when no msgHandler override
spawns one PARALLEL PROCESS per accepted connection
properties.vocab_gap: TRL has no 'SPAWN PER' pattern — encoded as property.

properties.role: after validate stage, classify stage delegates to handleMessageFull
every CHAT Message is classified against guardrails FIRST
MaxInputBytes, RateLimit, MaxInputTokens, SessionTimeout, Greeting, ConfidenceMin
Server governs every Message — ROUTE invariant
Dial calls ClientHandshake after TCP dial
Accept calls ServerHandshake after TCP accept
loads JSON TRUG and appends to guardrails
